verses.text: Tua kum mah, a kha sagihna, a ni sawmnih leh ni khat ni-in kamsang Haggai tungah Topa in thu gen a
Judah gam ukpa Zerubbabel, siampi lianpenpa Joshua, leh mi khempeuh tungah thu a gen dingin sawl a
“Nidanga biakinn a hoihna dan a ciamteh theilai na om uh hiam? Tu-in bangci na sa uh hiam? Note' muhna-ah a gen taak hetlo tawh kibang ding hi
Tu-in note kuamah lungkia kei un. Note tawh hong omkhawm ka hih manin nasep kipan un
Egypt gam panin na paikhiat lai-un, note kong ompih tawntungna ding thu kong ciam hi. Tu-in zong note hong ompihlai ka hih manin lau kei un
“A sawtloin vanpi leh leipi, tuipi leh leitung ka lokgawp ding hi
Minam dang khempeuh lokgawp ding ka hih manin a neihsa uh sum leh paite, hih munah hong kipuak ding a, biakinn sungah a dimin van hong om ding hi
Leitunga a om ngun leh kham khempeuh keima-a' ahi hi
Biakinn thak pen a lui sangin hoihzaw-in thupizaw ding hi. Hih biakinn-ah cihtheihna leh nopsakna kong pia ding hi,” cisak hi.
Gam uk kumpipa Darias in a uk a kum nihna mah, a kha kuana a ni sawmnih leh ni li ni-in kamsang Haggai tungah Topa in thu gen leuleu a
“Hih thu tawh kisai-in siampite' ngaihsutna dong in

Mi khatpeuh in biakna-a a kipia sa siangtho themkhat, a puantualpi thep kawmah puakha hen la, tua a puantualpi tawh anlum khat peuhpeuh ahi a, a kihuan an khat peuhpeuh ahi a, leenggahzu, ahih kei leh oliv thau, ahih kei leh an nam khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin sukha leh, tua a sukkhak an pen biakna an siangtho a suak ding hiam?” ci-in a dongsak hi. Tua bangin a kidot ciangin siampite in, “Tua puantualpi in a sukkhak ante, biakna an siangtho suak tuanlo ding hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi

Tua ciangin Haggai in, “Mi khat in, misi tawh a kisukkhak manin mi nin a suah khit ciangin hih ante khat peuhpeuh lawngkha leh tua a lawn'khak ante a nin a suak ding hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Siampite in, “A nin suak ding hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi

Tua ciangin Haggai in thu gen a, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Tu-a nong dawn'na uh mah bangin hih minam dangte' sepna khempeuhah tua bangin piang ahih manin, biakna tau tungah a piak uh na khempeuh a nin suak hi
“Note tungah a piangsa thute limtakin ngaihsun un. Topa' biakinn lam ding na kipat ma-un bangci na hi uh hiam

An seu sawmnih pha ding ci-in ansal-ah na pai uh ciangin seu sawm bek na pha a, leenggahzu thawlpi sawmnga pha ding ci-in leenggahzu kholna beelpi-ah na pai uh ciangin thawlpi sawmnih dim bek a na pha hi
Na an ciin' khempeuh uh cingteek sakin ka kausansak a, tuate nangawn a susia dingin gialpi ka kiatsak hangin note na kisik nuam kei lailai uh hi
Tu-in, kha kuana a ni sawmnih leh ni li ni, biakinn bulpi a kiphuh khit, tuni-a kipanin limtakin ngaihsun un

Na ansal uhah na upmawhzah sangun an na tawmzaw lai ding ahi hiam? Leenggui leh theikung, mang kawlsing leh oliv kungte gah nailo lai ding ahi hiam? Tua bang hi nawnlo ding a, tuni-a kipanin note thupha kong pia ding hi, ci hi,” a ci hi.
Tua kha a ni sawmnih leh ni li ni mahin Topa in Haggai tungah a nihveina thu genkik a
“Vanpi leh leipi a lokgawp ding ka hihna thu, Judah gam ukpa Zerubbabel kiangah gen in

Kumpipa' gam khempeuh lumletin a vangliatna uh a beisak ding ka hi hi. Leengte leh leeng hawlte ka lawnthal ding a, sakol leengte leh a tung tuangte puk ding uh a, amaute khatlekhat kithatlum ding uh hi

Ka nasem Zerubbabel aw, tua ni ciangin nang hong la-in ka mite' kumpi dingin kong bawl ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen ka hong teelpa na hi hi, Vanglian Topa in ci hi, ci-in gen in,” a ci hi.
